CONTENT.Club career: After making his professional debut with Tours FC, Miguel played for Nîmes Olympique before joining Spanish side SD Huesca on a two-year contract on 6 August 2021. On 25 July 2023, he joined Belgian club Oud-Heverlee Leuven.On 17 July 2024, Miguel returned to Spain after signing a two-year deal with Burgos CF.
CONTENT.Personal life: Miguel was born in France to a French mother and Portuguese father. He is a France youth international.
CONTENT.External links: Florian Miguel at BDFutbolFlorian Miguel at L'Équipe Football (in French)

SUMMARY: Florian Miguel (born 1 September 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Spanish club Burgos CF.
